home.title: Detect vulnerabilities before hackers do
home.subtitle: Analyze your website security in minutes. Professional scanning engine with 50+ attack vectors, AI explanations and PDF reports ready for audits.
home.hero_description: Analyze your website security in minutes. Professional scanning engine with 50+ attack vectors, AI explanations and PDF reports ready for audits.
home.step1_desc: Enter your website address. We confirm you are the owner or have permission to analyze it.
home.step2_desc: Our engine analyzes 50+ attack vectors in real-time with cutting-edge technology.
home.step3_desc: Artificial intelligence explains each vulnerability in clear language with specific recommendations.
home.step4_desc: Download a complete PDF report ready to present to your technical team or clients.
home.vulnerabilities_desc: We analyze 50+ attack vectors based on OWASP Top 10 standard and latest known threats.
home.faq_q1: Is it legal to scan my own website?
home.faq_a1: Yes, completely legal. You just need to confirm you are the owner or have explicit permission from the owner to perform the analysis. We never perform scans without authorization.
home.faq_q2: How long does the analysis take?
home.faq_a2: The complete analysis usually takes 2-5 minutes depending on the size and complexity of the site. You will see the progress in real time throughout the process.
home.faq_q3: What does the free report include?
home.faq_a3: The free report shows the total number of vulnerabilities found and the overall risk level (Low, Medium, High, Critical). To see technical details and solutions, you need the full report.
home.faq_a4: All data is transmitted encrypted with TLS. Scan results are stored securely and only you can access your reports. We comply with GDPR.

scan.title: Analyze website
scan.subtitle: Enter the URL of the website you want to analyze. Analysis takes between 2 and 5 minutes.
scan.owner_confirmation: I confirm that I am the owner of this website or have explicit authorization to perform this analysis.
scan.scanning: Analysis usually takes between 2 and 5 minutes depending on the size and complexity of the website. You will see the progress in real time.
scan.no_vulnerabilities: Excellent! No critical vulnerabilities were found.
scan.report_locked_desc: Unlock the full report to see all vulnerabilities and recommendations.
scan.login_required_desc: You need an account to perform security analysis.

dashboard.title: Control Panel
dashboard.no_scans: You have no scans yet. Create one to get started!

pricing.title: Plans & Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your needs
pricing.custom_plan_desc: For companies with specific needs, we offer customized plans with dedicated support and tailored features.

footer.description: Professional automated pentesting platform. Protect your digital presence with cutting-edge security technology.
